result:
I’d make it so people had a much harder time dehumanizing each other.

A lot of the worst things—violence, exploitation, neglect—get easier the moment someone stops seeing another person as fully human. If that mental shortcut just… didn’t work so well anymore, a lot of downstream problems would get weaker too. Not magically gone, but harder to justify, harder to ignore.

It wouldn’t fix everything. People would still disagree, compete, mess up. But there’d be more friction against cruelty, and more room for empathy to actually matter.

prompt: If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
